name: Da Marina al teatro
description: In the main square, simple setup, very good meat and pizza. Generous portions.

name: Taverna di Ro
description: Traditional recipes well executed, simple location in the center of Cingoli. The owner has a moody personality.

name: Ca’ vecchia Beerstrot
description: Ancient country farmhouse on top of a hill with a beautiful panorama. Very good meat.

name: La Torre
description: Perhaps the most panoramic restaurant of the Conero area, seafood specialties, refined cuisine.

name: Da Sara
description: Historic restaurant in a small square in Sirolo, simple and no-frills setup, traditional and excellent cuisine.

name: Bar Belvedere
description: Small kiosk immersed in the Conero park, panoramic, meat-focused menu (few choices… but all very good).

name: Osteria dei Segreti (Agriturismo)
description: Country restaurant with sophisticated cuisine, beautiful location (with swimming pool).

name: Da Silvano
description: Historic inn in the city center, excellent grilled meat and vegetables; they also make pizza.

name: Osteria dei Fiori
description: Small trattoria in an alley of Macerata’s historic center, regional specialty cuisine (vincisgrassi).

name: Antica Fornace
address: Via Don Giovanni Minzoni, 11, 62010 Treia MC
description: In the city’s historic center, simple setup, traditional recipes well executed.

name: La Vecchia Pesca
description: Historic restaurant in Ancona built on stilts; seafood dishes, very panoramic and a bit romantic.

name: Da Emilia
description: Very panoramic by the sea, simple and genuine cuisine; very friendly owner.

name: Marcello
description: Entirely similar to the restaurant “Da Emilia.”

name: Hostaria Dietro le Quinte
description: Very charming, elegant location, traditional dishes revisited and updated.

name: Il Borgo Antico
description: In the basement of a building in the historic center; charming atmosphere with modernized Italian classics.

name: Taverna San Nicolò
description: In the cellars of a historic building; traditional cuisine well executed.

name: Mescola
description: Innovative and sophisticated, excellent drinks.

name: Le Scalette
description: Simple osteria close to home.

name: Osteria del Vicolo
address: Viale Cesare Battisti, 1, 62018 Potenza Picena MC
description: A slightly more refined spot (Slow Food); nice local dishes.

name: Andreina 1*
address: Via Zona Industriale Brodolini, 2, 60025 Loreto AN
description: 1 Michelin star restaurant – everything cooked on an open fire.

name: Clandestino Susci Bar 1*
description: 1 Michelin star “sushi” bar by the beach – sophisticated seafood cuisine.

name: Bocasalina Restaurant
description: High quality seafood, good service.

name: Ristorante La Limonaia
address: Km 336 SS 16 – Via Foce Asola 18, 62012 Civitanova Marche MC
description: Friendly owners; very high quality seafood.

name: Ristorante I Gelsi
description: Meat-focused, open-fire cooking in a 1700s country house setting.

name: Banco_12
address: Mercato Coperto, Via Francesco Gentili, 7, 63822 Porto San Giorgio FM
description: Sister restaurant to L’Arcade; a more approachable small-plates bistro in an old fish market.

name: Ristorante L’Arcade 1*
address: Lato mare, Lungomare Antonio Gramsci, 313, 63822 Porto San Giorgio FM
description: Fine dining (Michelin-starred restaurant).

name: Controvento (Natural Wine)
description: Women-owned natural wine bar and restaurant on the beach, with bottle service on the beach.

name: Il Tiglio (1*)
address: Localita' Isola Di San Biagio, 63048 Montemonaco AP
description: A refined dining experience in the Sibillini mountains. Chef-pushed tasting menus, seasonal ingredients, and creative interpretations of regional cuisine.

name: Vino e Cibo
description: Small and intimate osteria near the historic center. Natural wines, locally sourced dishes, and a warm, personal touch to service.

name: Il Topicco
description: Modern trattoria with sea views. Creative takes on Adriatic seafood, well-balanced flavors, and an inviting atmosphere.

name: Sepia by Niko
description: Charming Mediterranean seafood restaurant blending Sicilian and Marche flavors. Intimate setting in the historic center, with refined dishes.

name: Uliassi (3*)
description: Three-Michelin-starred temple of Adriatic seafood led by Mauro Uliassi. Creative tasting menus (Classic, Lab, Wild Game) from around €180–€240.

name: Il Quinto
description: Down to earth dishes, lovely intimate setting and friendly owners.

name: Cantina Andrea Giorgetti
description: Wine tasting with sunset views and a delicious aperitivo platter. Thu-Sun from 19:00.

name: NaStilla Vineria
description: Wine bar.

name: Koinè Vineria
description: Wine bar and restaurant.

name: Birrificio Resina
address: Strada Regina, km 3, 60128 Potenza Picena MC
description: Brewpub.

name: Groove Beer Bar
address: Belvedere donatori di sangue, 62018 Potenza Picena MC
description: Pub with a great view from the village viewpoint, great at night. Live music.
